archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) blended with Archetype 1 (Organic/Academic Warmth)

rules.labels: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-orange-600 font-semibold

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look) & Editorial Text Rhythms
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous (p-8 to p-16) to evoke academic textbook margins
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm for a sharp, structural math aesthetic
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid (Control Room Mode) with visible 1px borders for Cause Areas and Resources

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (bg-white or bg-stone-50), crisp 1px border (border-stone-300), no drop shadows. On hover, translate-y-[-2px] and subtle shadow-sm.
surface_strategies.header: Solid bg-stone-50/90 with backdrop-blur-md, bottom border border-stone-300
surface_strategies.buttons: Sharp corners. Primary: bg-orange-600 text-white hover:bg-orange-700. Secondary: border border-stone-300 bg-transparent text-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-100.

media.logo_instructions: Create an inline SVG representing a light bulb with a heart inside. Use stroke-width='1.5', stroke='currentColor'. Minimalist line-art style to match the mathematical/editorial vibe.

components.navigation: Sticky header with z-50. Logo left, Links center, 'Take Action' CTA right. Use Shadcn DropdownMenu for 'Learn' dropdown.
components.hero: 80vh to 100vh. Video background with dark overlay (bg-stone-900/70) to ensure text legibility. Large H1 text in White. Use a monospace accent tag in orange above the heading.
components.cause_areas: Use bento grid cards (Grid cols 1 md:cols-2). Each card has an image (max-h 200px), an overline, a title, and a snippet. Include the ITN (Importance, Tractability, Neglectedness) framework using small pill badges or monospace data rows.
components.resources: Dense grid layout. Differentiate formats (Book, Article, Podcast) using Lucide icons. Minimalist text.
components.theory_of_change: Use Flexbox/Grid to create a flow diagram layout. Boxes connected by decorative SVG arrows or mathematical operators (→, ∑) using JetBrains Mono font.
components.contact_form: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Textarea. Minimalist styling, sharp square borders (rounded-none).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install custom fonts from Google Fonts: Cormorant Garamond, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Implement the layout with strict grid alignments. Use a 1px border grid system for the 'Theory of Change' and 'Cause Areas' to emphasize structure.
Use standard HTML5 <video autoPlay loop muted playsInline> for the hero background, with object-fit: cover.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms.

Do NOT use generic gradients. Keep colors flat, borders crisp. Use a subtle repeating linear-gradient to create a faint grid paper effect (bg-[linear-gradient...]) in the background of structural sections.
Orange (#EA580C) must be used thoughtfully as an accent and CTA color, not as a blanket background, to maintain the sophisticated academic feel.
